001package net.okocraft.box.feature.gui.api.buttons.customnumber;
002
003import net.kyori.adventure.text.Component;
004import net.okocraft.box.feature.gui.api.button.RefreshableButton;
005import net.okocraft.box.feature.gui.api.lang.Styles;
006import net.okocraft.box.feature.gui.api.menu.Menu;
007import net.okocraft.box.feature.gui.api.session.CustomNumberHolder;
008import net.okocraft.box.feature.gui.api.util.TranslationUtil;
009import org.bukkit.Material;
010import org.bukkit.Sound;
011import org.bukkit.entity.Player;
012import org.bukkit.event.inventory.ClickType;
013import org.bukkit.inventory.meta.ItemMeta;
014import org.jetbrains.annotations.NotNull;
015import org.jetbrains.annotations.Nullable;
016
017import java.util.ArrayList;
018
019@SuppressWarnings("ClassCanBeRecord")
020public class ChangeCustomNumberUnitButton implements RefreshableButton {
021
022    private final CustomNumberHolder holder;
023    private final Component displayName;
024    private final Component clickToResetAmount;
025    private final int slot;
026    private final Menu menuToUpdate;
027
028    public ChangeCustomNumberUnitButton(@NotNull CustomNumberHolder holder,
029                                        @NotNull Component displayName, @NotNull Component clickToResetAmount,
030                                        int slot, @Nullable Menu menuToUpdate) {
031        this.holder = holder;
032        this.displayName = displayName;
033        this.clickToResetAmount = clickToResetAmount;
034        this.slot = slot;
035        this.menuToUpdate = menuToUpdate;
036    }
037
038    @Override
039    public @NotNull Material getIconMaterial() {
040        return Material.WHITE_STAINED_GLASS_PANE;
041    }
042
043    @Override
044    public int getIconAmount() {
045        return 1;
046    }
047
048    @Override
049    public @Nullable ItemMeta applyIconMeta(@NotNull Player viewer, @NotNull ItemMeta target) {
050        target.displayName(TranslationUtil.render(displayName, viewer));
051
052        var lore = new ArrayList<Component>();
053
054        var currentUnit = holder.getUnit();
055
056        for (var unit : CustomNumberHolder.Unit.values()) {
057            lore.add(
058                    Component.text()
059                            .content(" > " + unit.getAmount())
060                            .style(currentUnit == unit ? Styles.NO_DECORATION_AQUA : Styles.NO_DECORATION_GRAY)
061                            .build()
062            );
063        }
064
065        lore.add(Component.empty());
066        lore.add(TranslationUtil.render(clickToResetAmount, viewer));
067
068        target.lore(lore);
069
070        return target;
071    }
072
073    @Override
074    public int getSlot() {
075        return slot;
076    }
077
078    @Override
079    public void onClick(@NotNull Player clicker, @NotNull ClickType clickType) {
080        if (clickType.isShiftClick()) {
081            if (holder.getAmount() != 1) {
082                holder.setAmount(1);
083                clicker.playSound(clicker.getLocation(), Sound.ENTITY_EXPERIENCE_ORB_PICKUP, 100f, 1.5f);
084            }
085        } else {
086            holder.changeAmountUnit();
087            clicker.playSound(clicker.getLocation(), Sound.BLOCK_COMPARATOR_CLICK, 100f, 1.5f);
088        }
089
090        if (menuToUpdate != null) {
091            menuToUpdate.updateMenu(clicker);
092        }
093    }
094}
